scoringPolicy.watchScore: named signal score * 100 + average 24h/12h momentum clamped [-30,30] + log10(24h CHEF volume + 1) * 7 clamped [0,55] + supply progress * 22 clamped [0,22] - 8 when top buyer concentration is above 85%.
scoringPolicy.cargoScore: grade/current_price_chef value density clamped [0,45] + liquidity score clamped [0,50] + supply window bonus: 18 while progress is between 0 and 82%, 6 at or above 82%, otherwise 8.
scoringPolicy.riskNotes: Flags sparse observed fields, buyer concentration at or above 90%, 24h price change at or below -8%, 10k CHEF partial-fill routes, and zero/unknown 24h volume.

notChecked: liquidity outside the public Bazaar API
real swaps, transfers, or order execution

dataQuality.missingFieldPolicy: Observed missing fields are retained as null in summaries. Scoring helpers use neutral fallbacks only for calculations and sparse rows are flagged in risk notes.
